name: The Pearl
address: 180 High Park Lane, Silver Spring, MD 20910
approxRentRange: $3,172-$3,741/month for 2BR (Hawthorn plan: $3,172-$3,633; Olympia plan: $3,368-$3,741; per RentCafe and Zumper, June 2026)
bathroomsNote: 2BR floor plans (Hawthorn and Olympia) carry 2 full baths per RentCafe and Zumper. 1BR units are 1 bath. Units feature quartz countertops per listing descriptions.

notes.doormanDetail: Multiple listing sources (RentCafe, Zumper, VeryApt, ApartmentAdvisor) explicitly list '24 Hour Concierge Service.' Leasing office hours (Mon-Sat 9am-6pm, Sun 12pm-5pm) are separate from concierge staffing. Resident reviews on ApartmentRatings name specific overnight concierge staff as consistently present. Rated Confirmed 24h.
notes.building: LEED-certified luxury high-rise, 14 stories, 284 units, built 2017 by The Tower Companies. First Fitwel-certified multifamily building in the world. Winner of Best New Apartment 2017 (DC/MD). Located in The Blairs District, approximately 0.4 miles from Silver Spring Metro (Red Line). Walk Score 83, Transit Score 88.
notes.amenities: Aquaterra rooftop saltwater pool with cabanas; two-story fitness center with free weekly classes; wellness kitchen; WorkLab WiFi co-working lounge; on-site urban farm; dog park and pet spa; EV charging; Zipcar car sharing; package lockers; reservable guest suite; valet dry cleaning; bike room; residents lounge; TV lounge; onsite retail; controlled access.
notes.balconyDetail: Private balconies available on select units across multiple configurations: standard, long, double, and penthouse double balcony. Terraces also available on some units. Not every unit includes a balcony; presence depends on specific unit selection.
notes.has2BRor1BRDenDetail: 2BR floor plans confirmed: Hawthorn (2/2, 1,064-1,119 sq ft, $3,172-$3,633/mo) and Olympia (2/2, 1,124 sq ft, $3,368-$3,741/mo). No 1BR+den plan found in available sources; 1BR plans are Bayberry and Duxbury. Absence of a named den plan does not rule one out, but none confirmed.
notes.inUnitLaundryDetail: In-unit washer/dryer confirmed across multiple listing sources (Interim Homes, VeryApt, ApartmentRatings reviews) and resident reviews. One source listed 'washer/dryer connections' only; majority of sources confirm full in-unit machines. Verify with leasing for specific unit.
notes.unitClimateDetail: Air conditioning listed as a unit feature on multiple sources. Individual thermostat control vs. building-managed chilled water system not confirmed explicitly. Rated Yes (in-unit control assumed for a luxury 2017 building with this profile, but verify with leasing to confirm independently controlled thermostats).
notes.petDetail: Cats and dogs welcome. Up to 2 pets per home. Weight limit approximately 100 lbs. Breed restrictions apply (Pit Bulls, Rottweilers, Huskies, German Shepherds listed). $500 refundable deposit per pet and $45/month pet rent per RentCafe. Dog park and pet grooming station on-site.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Rated 4.5/5 across 202 resident reviews on ApartmentRatings and 7.6/10 on Zumper. Reviewers consistently describe professional, responsive staff and 24-hour emergency maintenance. Main recurring complaint is power outages during storms.
notes.phoneNote: Primary leasing phone (301) 587-3275. Secondary numbers seen: (227) 238-1838 and (844) 432-0208 ext. 8735 on RentCafe and Zumper respectively; may be call-center or third-party lines.
